title: Resolve PR #261 merge conflicts
description:
Merge PR #261 into develop by resolving conflicts from the score-version activity-tab work while preserving procedure dispatch indicator behavior.

Definition of Done:
- Conflict markers are removed.
- Focused dashboard and Python checks pass or failures are documented.
- PR branch is pushed.
- PR #261 is merged into develop.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started conflict resolution on PR #261. Resolved textual conflicts by preserving local dispatch UI behavior, preserving develop score-version query work, and making procedure realtime metadata merges happen through one helper.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Focused checks passed: dashboard Jest run for ProcedureTask/TaskStatus/procedure dashboard/score tabs, dashboard typecheck, and Python dispatch/procedure optimizer-result tests. Updated one stale failure assertion so direct local failed runs expect dispatchStatus LOCAL.
